text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part1-1st:0Sk is the 3rd track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by . 

Title

The Japanese word for 0 is pronounced "rei", which makes the title a homophone of "Reisu-ke", the Reiss family. 

Musical motifs

The track is split into 3 parts. The ostinato (0:00-0:05) and main melody (0:20-0:40) of the first part of this track (0:00-2:16) are motifs that appear in two other tracks:

AoTs3-PF2
YouSee-Power

The second half of the track (2:18-3:00) is just a slower version of the first. The third part (3:00-6:06) is a bit more hectic.
